title: BJRMH Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 08 Senior Resident Posts
description: The Babu Jagjivan Ram Memorial Hospital (BJRMH) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 08 Senior Resident Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MD/MS, DNB, Post-graduation, PGDM, and MBBS can apply for the BJRMH Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
